title: 水水的苏州快乐之旅
event:
放假了，爸爸妈妈带水水出门玩，他们先去了上海，然后从上海做火车到苏州。
火车很快就到了苏州，爸爸妈妈带着水水入住美丽的苏州凯悦酒店。
一到酒店门口，就碰到一群可爱的铜铸的小鹅，它们造型特别可爱，水水就开心的和小鹅排了好多搞怪的姿势照片
第二天，爸爸妈妈带水水去了一个非常棒的户外儿童乐园玩。水水准备在这里完成像朱迪警官的体能训练。
她一会玩攀爬架，一会玩秋千，一会玩攀岩，一会玩滑梯，甚至还玩了一个好多根的障碍木墩。可厉害了。
玩累了，妈妈给水水喝水，吃了点橘子，又恢复体力了
然后爸爸和水水 就扮演朱迪和尼克，妈妈就扮演坏绵羊，爸爸和水水追着妈妈跑，水水一边喊，快，坏绵羊跑了，快追上她～～～
玩得太开心了，又玩累了，爸爸妈妈和水水在沙坑边上休息，就看到一个哥哥爬到一个高高的台子上，然后用一个滑轮装置，往台子上吊沙子，然后把运上来的沙子又倒入一个管子里，沙子就像小瀑布一样，从高台上往下撒～～太搞笑了
一早上的时间很快就过了。爸爸妈妈就带着水水开心去吃午饭去了

pages.scene: 高铁车厢里，水水靠在窗边看外面的春景，小黄趴在她腿上打盹，爸爸妈妈坐在旁边笑
pages.narration: 春天到啦，水水和爸爸妈妈去苏州玩~
pages.image_prompt: 3-year-old rabbit girl Shuishui in her defined outfit, fox dad and rabbit mom in their defined outfits, orange cat Xiaohuang in his defined look, sit in high speed train, green spring rapeseed fields outside window, warm soft sunlight, happy relaxed expressions, medium shot, Disney Zootopia CG style, bright soft color, children's book illustration

pages.scene: 苏州凯悦酒店门口，一群圆滚滚的铜铸小鹅排排站，水水兴奋地朝小鹅跑过去，小黄蹦跶着跟在后面
pages.narration: 酒店门口有好多可爱的铜小鹅呀！
pages.image_prompt: Shuishui—clad in an exquisite outfit and seen from behind—is rushing toward the hotel entrance plaza, where four adorable, life-sized bronze goslings in various poses are situated. Little Huang, tail wagging, trots close behind. A warm spring breeze caresses the face, and the sunlight is bright and radiant; the scene employs a wide-angle composition with vivid, cheerful colors, evoking an overall animated aesthetic reminiscent of *Zootopia*.

pages.scene: 水水歪着脑袋、吐着舌头和小鹅摆搞怪姿势合影，爸爸举着手机拍，小黄蹲在小鹅旁边一起入镜
pages.narration: 水水和小鹅拍了好多搞怪照片~
pages.image_prompt: Shuishui makes funny cross-eyed face next to bronze goslings, fox dad holds phone taking photos, Xiaohuang sits beside gosling looking at camera, cheerful atmosphere, medium shot, bright natural light, Zootopia CG style

pages.scene: 户外儿童乐园里，水水手脚麻利地爬攀爬架，小黄站在下面仰着脑袋举小爪子加油
pages.narration: 儿童乐园超好玩，水水爬架子特别厉害！
pages.image_prompt: A four-panel layout featuring diagonal divisions. Panel 1: Shuishui climbs a colorful jungle gym at an outdoor playground. Panel 2: Shuishui swings on a swing set. Panel 3: Shuishui digs in the sand. Panel 4: Shuishui slides down a slide. Little Huang follows her everywhere, running around to cheer her on. The scene is surrounded by lush green willows and bathed in bright spring sunshine. The imagery is dynamic and full of energy, with expressions of pure excitement, rendered in a style inspired by *Zootopia*.

pages.scene: 水水坐在公园长椅上，妈妈递来温水和剥好的橘子，小黄趴在旁边舔爪子休息
pages.narration: 玩累啦，吃点橘子喝点水恢复体力~
pages.dialogue: 妈妈：慢点儿喝，不着急哦。
pages.image_prompt: Shuishui sits on wooden bench drinking water, mom hands her peeled orange slices, Xiaohuang lies beside her resting, soft warm sunlight filters through leaves, medium close up, gentle cozy atmosphere, Zootopia style

pages.scene: 水水和爸爸扮演朱迪和尼克，追着扮演坏绵羊的妈妈跑，小黄摇着尾巴跟着一起跑
pages.narration: 捉坏绵羊啦！水水和爸爸追得飞快~
pages.dialogue: 水水：坏绵羊别跑！快追上她！
pages.image_prompt: Shuishui and fox dad run chasing rabbit mom in playground, Xiaohuang runs along with them, all have big happy grins, dynamic motion blur, sunny day, bright cheerful color, Zootopia CG style

pages.scene: 大家坐在沙坑边休息，看小哥哥用滑轮把沙子吊到高台上，沙子顺着管子流下来像小瀑布，水水捂嘴笑，小黄歪头看
pages.narration: 沙子像小瀑布一样掉下来，太好玩啦！
pages.image_prompt: An outdoor children's playground. Shuishui, Dad, and Mom sit beside a sandbox, watching a little boy on a raised platform use a pulley system to hoist up sand, which cascades down like a waterfall. Little Huang tilts his head, his expression brimming with curiosity. The scene radiates an atmosphere of joy and wonder. Mid-shot composition; *Zootopia* animation style.

pages.scene: 爸爸妈妈牵着水水的手走在林荫路上，小黄趴在爸爸肩膀上打哈欠，三个人都笑得很开心
pages.narration: 玩了一上午，开开心心去吃好吃的咯~
pages.dialogue: 爸爸：今天我们吃苏州甜甜的小点心哦！
pages.image_prompt: Shuishui holds hands of mom and dad walking toward restaurant, Xiaohuang lies on dad's shoulder yawning, warm golden spring sunlight, wide shot, warm happy atmosphere, Zootopia children's book illustration

outfits.水水: light pink floral ruffle dress, white canvas shoes, pink rabbit ear hairband
outfits.狐狸爸爸: thin khaki casual jacket, white cotton t-shirt, blue jeans, white sneakers
outfits.兔子妈妈: pale blue wrap floral dress, white loafers, small straw hair clip
outfits.小黄: round orange cat with silver bell on collar
